initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.label NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.label
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element = 'c'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
);
